Package index

Data and Datasets

ACOG_Districts
ACOG Districts Data
acgme
ACGME OBGYN Residency Data
acog_presidents
ACOG Presidents Data
census_summaries
Summarize Census Block Group Demographics
cityStateToLatLong
City/state latitude and longitude reference data
fips
Data of FIPS codes
physicians
Physicians Dataset
taxonomy
Taxonomy Codes for Obstetricians and Gynecologists

Provider Search and NPI

Find, validate, and enrich physician records via the NPI registry.

mysterycall_search_and_process_npi()
Search and Process NPI Numbers
mysterycall_search_taxonomy()
Search NPI Database by Taxonomy
mysterycall_validate_npi()
Validate and Remove Invalid NPI Numbers
mysterycall_get_clinician_data()
Retrieve Clinician Data
mysterycall_genderize()
Genderize Physicians Data
mysterycall_luhn_check()
Validate NPI numbers using the official CMS Luhn checksum
mysterycall_extract_zip5()
Extract a clean 5-digit ZIP code from a dirty string
mysterycall_extract_physician_name()
Extract a formatted physician name from a raw string
mysterycall_parse_certification_subspecialty()
Map an ABOHNS certification_type string to a subspecialty label
mysterycall_check_generalist_presence()
Flag locations where generalist physicians are absent
npi_utils
NPI validation utilities
address_utils
Address cleaning utilities
caller_management
Caller-management utilities for mystery-caller studies
specialty_utils
Specialty parsing and physician name extraction utilities

Address Normalization

USPS-standard address normalization: directionals, suffixes, units, state codes, ZIP extraction, and full data-frame normalization.

address_normalizer
USPS Address Normalization Utilities
mysterycall_ascii_norm() ascii_norm()
Normalize ASCII Characters and Whitespace
mysterycall_caps() caps()
Convert to Canonical Uppercase
mysterycall_is_po_box() is_po_box()
Detect PO Box Addresses
mysterycall_has_street_number() has_street_number()
Detect Addresses with Street Numbers
mysterycall_normalize_state() normalize_state()
Normalize State Names to USPS Codes
mysterycall_normalize_directionals() normalize_directionals()
Normalize Directional Prefixes and Suffixes
mysterycall_normalize_suffix() normalize_suffix()
Normalize Street Suffixes
mysterycall_normalize_units() normalize_units()
Normalize Unit Designators
mysterycall_normalize_zip5() normalize_zip5()
Extract 5-Digit ZIP Code
mysterycall_strip_suite() strip_suite()
Remove Unit Designators from Address
normalize_address_df()
Normalize All Address Fields in a Data Frame

Academic Classification

Classify physician practice settings as academic vs. non-academic using tiered confidence scoring and institution name patterns.

academic_indicators
Academic Practice Indicators for Institution Classification
mysterycall_classify_academic_affiliation() classify_academic_affiliation()
Classify Academic vs. Non-Academic Practice Setting
mysterycall_check_academic_name_patterns() check_academic_name_patterns()
Check if Organization Name Suggests Academic Affiliation
mysterycall_get_academic_indicators_summary() get_academic_indicators_summary()
Export Academic Indicator Summary
KNOWN_ACADEMIC_INSTITUTIONS
Known Academic Medical Centers
ACADEMIC_HOSPITAL_PATTERNS
Academic Hospital Name Patterns
ACGME_PROGRAM_INDICATORS
ACGME Program Indicators
COTH_TEACHING_INDICATORS
COTH (Council of Teaching Hospitals) Indicators
MEDICAL_SCHOOL_INDICATORS
Medical School Affiliation Patterns
NIH_CTSA_HUBS
NIH CTSA Hub Patterns
NCI_CANCER_CENTERS
NCI-Designated Cancer Center Patterns
MEDICARE_GME_INDICATORS
Medicare GME Payment Indicators

Geocoding and Mapping

Geocode addresses, build isochrones, and produce publication maps.

mysterycall_geocode()
Geocode unique addresses from a file
mysterycall_create_isochrones()
Memoized function to try a location with isoline calculations
mysterycall_isochrones_for_df()
Get isochrones for each point in a dataframe
mysterycall_plot_isochrones()
Create Individual Isochrone Maps and Shapefiles
mysterycall_clear_isochrone_cache()
Clear the isochrone memoization cache
mysterycall_map_base()
Create a Configurable Leaflet Base Map
mysterycall_map_leaflet()
Create a Leaflet Base Map
mysterycall_map_acog_districts()
Create sf Polygons for ACOG Districts
mysterycall_map_block_group()
Function to create and export a map showing block group overlap with isochrones
mysterycall_map_physicians()
Create and Save a Leaflet Dot Map of Physicians
mysterycall_calculate_overlap()
Calculate intersection overlap and save results to shapefiles.
mysterycall_hrr()
Get Hospital Referral Region Shapefile
mysterycall_hrr_maps()
Generate Hexagon Maps for Hospital Referral Regions (HRR)
mysterycall_assign_region()
Map US states to medical society districts and Census regions
ensure_hrr_shapefile()
Ensure the Dartmouth Atlas HRR boundary shapefile is available locally

Acceptance Rate Maps

Choropleth maps of appointment acceptance rates by state.

mysterycall_map_acceptance_rate()
Choropleth map of appointment acceptance rates by US state

Census and Demographics

mysterycall_get_census_data()
Get Census data of all state block groups
mysterycall_summarize_census()
Produce summary statistics from Census block group data
mysterycall_plot_census_age()
Plot the distribution of female age groups
mysterycall_get_acs_adults_18_90() get_acs_adults_18_90()
Get ACS Adult Population (Ages 18-90, Both Sexes) by Census Tract
mysterycall_get_acs_women_18_90() get_acs_women_18_90()
Get ACS Female Population (Ages 18-90) by Census Tract

Data Cleaning and Processing

Clean Phase 1/2 data, rename columns, recode variables, and impute missing values.

mysterycall_clean_phase1()
Clean Phase 1 Results Data
mysterycall_clean_phase2()
Clean and process Phase 2 data
mysterycall_rename_columns()
Rename columns based on substring matches
mysterycall_split_and_save()
Split data into multiple parts and save each part as separate Excel files
mysterycall_remove_constants()
Remove Constant Variables from a Data Frame
mysterycall_remove_near_zero()
Remove Near-Zero Variance Variables from a Data Frame
mysterycall_check_normality()
Check Normality and Summarize Data
mysterycall_create_formula()
Create a Formula for Poisson Model
mysterycall_recode_credentials()
Recode raw physician credential strings to MD, DO, or Other
mysterycall_reorder_by_freq()
Reorder a factor (or character vector) by descending frequency
mysterycall_collapse_rare()
Collapse rare factor/character levels into an "Other" category
mysterycall_merge_with_prefix()
Merge two data frames with source-prefixed column names
mysterycall_classify_ruca()
Classify RUCA codes into Urban / Suburban / Rural
mysterycall_classify_medical_school()
Classify medical school as US_MD, US_DO, CAN_MD, or IMG
mysterycall_classify_practice_setting()
Classify physician practice setting from facility/organization name
mysterycall_reconcile_specialty()
Three-tier specialty reconciliation with audit columns
mysterycall_impute_age()
Impute physician age from medical school graduation year
mysterycall_age_category()
Bin physician ages into decade categories
mysterycall_stratified_sample()
Draw a balanced stratified sample from a data frame
mysterycall_check_duplicates()
Flag physicians called more than the allowed number of times
mysterycall_prepare_table1_vars()
Standardise demographic variables for Table 1
mysterycall_assign_scenarios()
Assign call scenarios to generalist providers
data_utils
Data utilities for mystery-caller study management
factor_utils
Factor and categorical-variable utilities
mysterycall_academic_patterns()
Return the built-in academic keyword patterns
mysterycall_government_patterns()
Return the built-in government keyword patterns
mysterycall_age
Physician age imputation and categorization

Business Days

Calculate business-day wait times excluding weekends and federal holidays.

mysterycall_business_days()
Business-day utilities for mystery caller studies
mysterycall_count_business_days()
Count business days between two dates (vectorized)
mysterycall_us_federal_calendar()
Build a US federal holiday calendar

Outcomes and Wait Times

Core outcome functions: acceptance rate, wait-time distribution, and Poisson modeling.

mysterycall_acceptance_rate()
Compute appointment acceptance rates
mysterycall_wait_time_summary()
Summarise appointment wait times
mysterycall_poisson_model()
Fit a Poisson GLMER for mystery caller wait-time analysis
mysterycall_irr_plot()
IRR forest plot for a Poisson GLMER result
mysterycall_model_table()
Word-ready IRR table from a fitted Poisson model
mysterycall_model_metrics()
Compute MAE and RMSE from a fitted Poisson or linear model
mysterycall_select_best_model()
Compare and rank competing fitted models
mysterycall_screen_interactions()
Screen candidate variables for interaction with a primary exposure
mysterycall_outcomes
Primary outcome analysis for mystery caller studies
print(<mysterycall_poisson_model>)
Print method for mysterycall_poisson_model objects

Statistical Analysis

Disparities tables, multiple-comparison correction, bootstrap CIs, marginal effects, and wave-over-wave comparisons.

mysterycall_disparities_table()
Compute Disparity Metrics Across Groups
mysterycall_multiple_comparison_adjust()
Adjust P-Values for Multiple Comparisons
mysterycall_bootstrap_ci()
Bootstrap Confidence Intervals for a Summary Statistic
mysterycall_marginal_effects()
Compute average marginal effects for a Poisson GLM or GLMER
mysterycall_compare_waves()
Compare a study outcome across waves of a mystery caller study
mysterycall_plot_emmeans()
Plot and Save Estimated Marginal Means (EMMs)
mysterycall_plot_emmeans_full()
Full emmeans interaction plot with optional file save
mysterycall_plot_emmeans_interaction()
Visualise estimated marginal means for an interaction
mysterycall_plot_effect()
Plot marginal effects for a single model term
mysterycall_plot_sjplot_interaction()
Interaction visualization via sjPlot
print(<mysterycall_disparities_table>)
Print a mysterycall_disparities_table

Sample Size and Power

Poisson power calculations and sample-size formulas for mystery-caller studies.

mysterycall_poisson_power()
Sample-size calculation for a Poisson mystery caller study
mysterycall_cochran_n()
Cochran finite-population sample size
mysterycall_equation_figure()
Poisson power curve: required sample size across a range of IRRs
mysterycall_sample_size_text()
Generate a sample-size methods sentence
mysterycall_power
Power and sample-size tools for mystery caller studies

Caller Quality Control

Audit caller performance: inter-rater reliability and per-caller productivity metrics.

mysterycall_caller_reliability()
Compute inter-rater reliability between mystery callers
mysterycall_call_productivity()
Compute per-caller productivity metrics
print(<mysterycall_reliability>)
Print method for mysterycall_reliability objects

Visualization

Publication-ready plots for distributions, interactions, residuals, and stacked bars.

mysterycall_plot_stacked_bar()
Stacked bar chart of appointment acceptance by group
mysterycall_plot_interaction()
Create and plot interaction effects from a Poisson GLMM
mysterycall_plot_density()
Create a Density Plot for Mystery Caller Studies with Optional Transformations
mysterycall_plot_distribution()
Distribution plots for numeric outcome variables
mysterycall_plot_residuals()
Residual diagnostic plots for a fitted model
mysterycall_plot_line()
Create a Line Plot with Optional Transformations and Grouping
mysterycall_plot_scatter()
Create a Scatter Plot for Mystery Caller Studies with Optional Transformations, Jitter, and Custom Labels
mysterycall_plot_inclexcl()
CONSORT-style inclusion/exclusion flowchart for mystery-caller studies
mysterycall_flowchart()
CONSORT-style inclusion/exclusion flowchart
mysterycall_save_plot()
Save a ggplot2 figure with publication-quality defaults
plot_effects
Marginal effect plots for fitted models

Tables and Reports

mysterycall_table1()
Build a Table 1 for mystery caller studies
mysterycall_table1_gtsummary()
Publication-ready Table 1 via gtsummary
mysterycall_max_table()
Calculate the Maximum Value(s) and Corresponding Level(s) of a Factor Variable
mysterycall_min_table()
Calculate the Minimum Value(s) and Corresponding Level(s) of a Factor Variable
mysterycall_write_arsenal_table()
Writes an Arsenal summary table to a Word document
mysterycall_table_percentages()
Frequency counts and percentages for a categorical variable
mysterycall_table_proportion()
Calculate the Proportion of Each Level in a Categorical Variable
mysterycall_table_overall()
Generate an overall summary table
mysterycall_write_table_pdf()
Write an Arsenal table to a PDF file
mysterycall_save_quality_table()
Save Quality Check Table
mysterycall_format_pct()
Format a Numeric Value as a Percentage
mysterycall_format_results_table()
Format an IRR table for manuscript display
print(<mysterycall_table1>)
Print a mysterycall_table1 object

Manuscript Writing

Auto-generate methods paragraphs, results sentences, and formatted output tables.

mysterycall_write_results_paragraph()
Generate a results paragraph for a mystery caller Poisson model
mysterycall_methods_paragraph()
Generate a boilerplate methods paragraph for a mystery-caller study
mysterycall_summarize_demographics()
One-line demographic summary for a study cohort
manuscript_helpers
Helpers for writing manuscript methods and results sections

Quality and Validation

mysterycall_check_data_completeness()
Assess completeness for required data columns
mysterycall_assess_data_quality()
Assess data quality
mysterycall_preflight_check()
Run comprehensive preflight checks before workflow
mysterycall_check_api_response()
Validate API response row count matches expectation
mysterycall_check_no_data_loss()
Validate no data loss between pipeline steps
mysterycall_check_no_limits()
Validate no artificial data limits in workflow
mysterycall_estimate_resources()
Estimate workflow resources
mysterycall_scan_for_limits()
Scan code files for artificial limit patterns
mysterycall_not_contacted_states()
Summarize States Where Physicians Were NOT Contacted
mysterycall_physician_age()
Calculate and Summarize Physician Age
mysterycall_most_common_gender()
Generate a Summary Sentence for the Most Common Gender, Specialty, Training, and Academic Affiliation
mysterycall_verify_artifact()
Verify the content-addressable identity of an audit trail JSON file
preflight-checks
Preflight Checks for Tyler Workflows
mysterycall_validate_google_api()
Validate Google Maps API key
mysterycall_validate_here_api()
Validate routing API key

Workflow

mysterycall_run_workflow()
Run the end-to-end mystery caller workflow
mysterycall_run_workflow_logged()
Run the mystery caller workflow with structured logging
mysterycall_workflow_start()
Initialize workflow tracking
mysterycall_workflow_end()
End workflow and print summary
mysterycall_print_dashboard()
Print a formatted summary dashboard
mysterycall_tracker_fail()
Mark a tracker step as failed
mysterycall_tracker_update()
Emit a manual progress heartbeat
mysterycall_export_with_backup()
Write tabular or graphical outputs with timestamped backups
mysterycall_resolve_path()
Resolve project-relative paths from standard aliases
mysterycall_cache_dir()
Determine the cache directory used for downloaded resources

Logging

mysterycall_log_info()
Log informational message
mysterycall_log_error()
Log error message with context
mysterycall_log_warning()
Log warning message
mysterycall_log_success()
Log success message
mysterycall_log_progress()
Log progress for batch operations
mysterycall_log_step()
Log a step start
mysterycall_log_step_complete()
Complete current step with timing
mysterycall_log_cache_hit()
Log cache hit
mysterycall_log_save()
Log file save
logging-utils
Comprehensive Logging Utilities for mysterycall
mysterycall_log_to_file()
Write to log file if configured

Progress and Spinners

mysterycall_progress_tracker()
Track multi-stage workflow progress
mysterycall_progress_start()
Mark a step as started
mysterycall_progress_finish()
Mark a step as completed
mysterycall_progress_fail()
Fail progress bar
mysterycall_progress_update()
Update progress bar
mysterycall_progress_summary()
Return a tibble describing step-by-step progress
mysterycall_progress_bar()
Create a beautiful progress bar
mysterycall_progress_callback()
Create a simple progress callback for batch operations
mysterycall_progress_done()
Complete progress bar
mysterycall_progress_map()
Create a progress bar for batch processing
mysterycall_multi_step()
Start a step in multi-progress tracker
mysterycall_multi_update()
Update current step in multi-progress tracker
mysterycall_multi_progress()
Create a multi-step progress tracker
mysterycall_multi_done()
Complete multi-step tracker
mysterycall_multi_complete()
Complete current step in multi-progress tracker
mysterycall_spinner_start()
Show a spinner for indeterminate operations
mysterycall_spinner_stop()
Stop a spinner
progress-bars
Beautiful Progress Bars for mysterycall

Green Journal Publication Utilities

ggplot2 themes, colorblind-safe palettes, and figure-export helpers conforming to Obstetrics & Gynecology (Green Journal) 2024 author guidelines (TIFF/PDF/PNG/CSV export, Okabe-Ito palette, Albers CRS).

theme_green_journal() theme_publication()
Green Journal ggplot2 theme
theme_green_journal_map() theme_publication_map()
Green Journal map theme
theme_green_journal_faceted() theme_publication_faceted()
Green Journal faceted map theme
palette_green_journal() palette_publication()
Colorblind-safe publication palette (Okabe-Ito)
scale_color_green_journal()
Green Journal discrete color scale
scale_fill_green_journal()
Green Journal discrete fill scale
save_green_journal_figure() save_publication_figure()
Save a figure in Green Journal submission format
mysterycall_crs_albers_conus() crs_albers_conus()
Albers Equal-Area CRS for the continental United States
mysterycall_winsorize() winsorize()
Winsorize extreme values
mysterycall_truncate_for_viz() truncate_for_viz()
Truncate values to fixed bounds
mysterycall_compose_map_density() compose_map_density()
Composite map + density figure

Utilities

mysterycall_check_dependencies()
Check for required R package dependencies
mysterycall_use_quiet_logging()
Toggle quiet logging for helper functions
mysterycall_standard_labels()
Retrieve the standard label dictionary used in mysterycall
mysterycall_standard_palette()
Retrieve a standard color palette
mysterycall_quality_tier()
Convert numeric scores to qualitative tiers
mysterycall_download_file()
Download a large file with resume support
mysterycall_format_duration()
Format duration in human-readable form
utility_library
Utility helpers for mysterycall workflows
mysterycall_tempdir()
Internal helper for package-specific temporary directories

Deprecated

arsenal_tables_write2word() calculate_intersection_overlap_and_save() check_normality() clean_phase_1_results() clean_phase_2_data() create_and_plot_interaction() create_density_plot() create_formula() create_individual_isochrone_plots() create_isochrones() create_isochrones_for_dataframe() create_line_plot() create_scatter_plot() download_large_file() format_pct() genderize_physicians() geocode_unique_addresses() get_census_data() hrr() hrr_generate_maps() map_create_acog_districts_sf() map_create_base() map_create_block_group_overlap() map_create_leaflet_base() map_create_physician_dot() max_table() min_table() most_common_gender_training_academic() physician_age() plot_and_save_emmeans() plot_census_age_distribution() remove_constant_vars() remove_near_zero_var() rename_columns_by_substring() retrieve_clinician_data() run_mystery_caller_workflow() run_mystery_caller_workflow_with_logging() save_quality_check_table() search_and_process_npi() search_by_taxonomy() split_and_save() states_where_physicians_were_NOT_contacted() summarize_census_data() table_calculate_percentages() table_calculate_proportion() table_generate_overall() table_write_pdf() validate_and_remove_invalid_npi() search_npi() test_and_process_isochrones() process_and_save_isochrones() progress_tracker() progress_tracker_start() progress_tracker_finish() progress_tracker_fail() progress_tracker_update() progress_tracker_summary()
Deprecated functions in mysterycall
tyler_assess_data_quality() tyler_calculate_overlap() tyler_check_api_response() tyler_check_data_completeness() tyler_check_dependencies() tyler_check_no_data_loss() tyler_check_no_limits() tyler_plot_emmeans() tyler_plot_interaction() tyler_plot_isochrones() tyler_plot_line() tyler_plot_scatter() tyler_preflight_check() tyler_print_dashboard() tyler_progress_bar() tyler_progress_callback() tyler_progress_done() tyler_progress_fail() tyler_progress_finish() tyler_progress_map() tyler_progress_start() tyler_progress_summary() tyler_progress_tracker() tyler_progress_update() tyler_quality_tier() tyler_remove_constants() tyler_remove_near_zero() tyler_rename_columns() tyler_resolve_path() tyler_run_workflow() tyler_run_workflow_logged() tyler_standard_palette() tyler_summarize_census() tyler_table_overall() tyler_table_percentages() tyler_table_proportion() tyler_use_quiet_logging() tyler_validate_npi() tyler_workflow_end() tyler_workflow_start() tyler_write_arsenal_table() tyler_write_table_pdf()
